suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When a feature claims shell-level coverage for a VfsAdapter fallback bug, require evidence that the chosen shell command actually exercises the targeted adapter path, or explicitly label that shell case as regression-only smoke coverage.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `fix-restricted-fs-async-lstat-ancestor-symlink-escape` found that `packages/webapp/tests/fs/restricted-fs-async-lstat.test.ts` used just-bash `stat`, while the red-phase failure came from the direct `RestrictedFS.lstat()` assertions; the shell case stayed green pre-fix and therefore did not itself prove the `VfsAdapter.lstat()` fallback path. See `.factory/validation/core-followup/scrutiny/reviews/fix-restricted-fs-async-lstat-ancestor-symlink-escape.json` and the feature handoff `handoffs/2026-04-17T18-25-22-743Z__fix-restricted-fs-async-lstat-ancestor-symlink-escape__8c9862c8-e3ea-41b4-b88e-4b4f5fde4ad3.json`.
